2142620.name: GenieMo®
2142620.description:
All The World's A GenieMo® Stage

GenieMo® is a new all-in-one createch spatial computing "Virtual Production" app, magically powered by the avant-garde GenieMoment realities engine and creator friendly tool flow.

Made for home "Green Screen Free" cinematic "Volumetric Video" making magic and real-time 4D "Authentic Presence" social-cast performance capture, share instantly with your audience by live streaming on variety of social video multi-channel networks (MozHubs, YouTube, GMeets, Zoom, Meets, Discord, Twitch)

Simple plug and play GenieMo® laboratory set-up with compatible off the shelf spatial computing sensors, AR/MR/VR displays, headgear & 3D content platforms (Kinect Depth Kit, Looking Glass Portrait, GenieMo Lamp, GenieMo VR Cardboard, YouTube 360, SketchFab)

Helping to educate and empower the next gen of DIY multi-dimensional motion arts story tellers

"using innovative technology Nutkhut & PlayLa.bZ immersed us within this important history. Future learning should no longer be 2 dimensional" Sarah Allen, Mozilla Festival Director
2142620.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
